title: Billing Overcharge on Last Statement
description: I noticed an extra charge of $49.99 on my last credit card statement from your company. This appears to be a billing overcharge. I only subscribed to the basic plan at $29.99/month. Please investigate and adjust the charge.

title: Cannot Login to Dashboard
description: I've been trying to access the analytics dashboard all morning, but after entering my credentials I get a generic 'Invalid username or password' error. I verified the password is correct. Could there be a temporary lockout?

title: Dark Mode for Mobile App
description: It would greatly improve usability for night-time users if the mobile app supported a dark mode theme. Many of your competitors offer this, and it's a convenient feature for accessibility as well.

title: How to Reset API Key
description: I need to regenerate the API key for our staging environment because the current one was accidentally committed to a public repo. I can't find the option in the admin panel. Can you guide me or reset it on your side?
